# Potty Pal AI

## About
Potty Pal AI is a personalized potty training app for parents of toddlers. It provides AI-powered coaching, customized training plans, progress tracking, and instant expert answers to potty training questions.

## Website
https://www.pottypalai.com

## App
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6751612917
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.pottypalai.app

## Key Features
- Personalized potty training plans based on your child's age, temperament, and readiness
- AI coaching that answers potty training questions instantly
- Progress tracking with milestone celebrations
- Guidance for common challenges: regression, resistance, nighttime training, travel

## Blog
https://www.pottypalai.com/blog/
The Potty Pal blog covers potty training tips, readiness signs, common problems, regression and setbacks, nighttime training, and special situations like travel and daycare.

## Topics We Cover
- When to start potty training (readiness signs)
- Potty training methods (3-day method, gradual approach, child-led)
- Poop withholding and constipation
- Potty training regression and setbacks
- Nighttime dryness and bedwetting
- Potty training in special situations (travel, daycare, new siblings)
- Potty training resistance and power struggles
- Potty training rewards and motivation

## Contact
support@pottypalai.com

## Disclaimer
Educational coaching, not medical advice. Consult your pediatrician for medical concerns.
